snippets.title: Audit missingness with pandas
snippets.code:
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    "age": [25, 30, None, 41],
    "income": [50_000, None, 62_000, 70_000],
    "city": ["A", "B", None, "A"],
})

pct = df.isna().mean().sort_values(ascending=False)
print(pct)
print("rows with any missing:", df.isna().any(axis=1).sum())
snippets.explanation: Start with per-column and per-row missing rates before choosing deletion or imputation.

snippets.title: Median imputation fit on train only (sklearn)
snippets.code:
import pandas as pd
from sklearn.impute import SimpleImputer
from sklearn.pipeline import Pipeline
from sklearn.linear_model import LogisticRegression

X_train = pd.DataFrame({"age": [20, None, 35, 40], "score": [0.8, 0.6, None, 0.9]})
y_train = [0, 1, 1, 0]
X_test = pd.DataFrame({"age": [None, 50], "score": [0.7, 0.5]})

pipe = Pipeline([
    ("imputer", SimpleImputer(strategy="median")),
    ("clf", LogisticRegression(max_iter=1000)),
])
pipe.fit(X_train, y_train)
print(pipe.predict(X_test))
snippets.explanation: SimpleImputer learns medians from X_train only; the same statistics transform X_test at predict time.

snippets.title: Missingness indicator alongside imputation
snippets.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

s = pd.Series([10.0, np.nan, 12.0, np.nan, 9.0])
indicator = s.isna().astype(int)
median = s.median()
filled = s.fillna(median)
print("filled:", filled.tolist())
print("was_missing:", indicator.tolist())
snippets.explanation: When missingness may be informative (MNAR suspicion), a flag lets linear models learn that absence itself carried signal.

snippets.title: Forward-fill for ordered timestamps
snippets.code:
import pandas as pd

ts = pd.DataFrame({
    "time": pd.to_datetime(["2024-01-01 10:00", "2024-01-01 10:01", "2024-01-01 10:02"]),
    "temp_c": [22.1, None, 22.3],
})
ts = ts.set_index("time").sort_index()
ts["temp_c"] = ts["temp_c"].ffill(limit=2)
print(ts)
snippets.explanation: Forward-fill carries the last observed value along a time index; limit caps how far a stale value propagates.
